extraction.one_line_summary: MOHORIC Matej attacked on the Signal d'Uchon (final climb) from a 29-rider breakaway that included yellow jersey VAN DER POEL, solo to victory.
tactical_patterns: Yellow jersey VAN DER POEL entered 29-rider break, forcing UAE to chase without team support—radical GC destabilization tactic.
CARAPAZ late attack inside 8km neutralized by Movistar chasing for VAN DER POEL, showing team priority confusion.
ROGLIC lost 3+ minutes without teammates present, exposing Jumbo-Visma's vulnerability when leader isolated on long stages.

rider_signals.VAN DER POEL Mathieu: positive: Entered massive breakaway while holding yellow, forcing rivals to burn energy without team support—unprecedented GC gamesmanship
rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: negative: Chase effort without Nibali/Van Aert in break revealed UAE tactical error on 249km stage with multiple GC threats ahead
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: negative: Lost 3+ minutes with zero teammates present, confirming crash injuries are degrading both form and team support
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: neutral: Late attack showed form but Movistar chased him down for Van der Poel, exposing confused team priorities
rider_signals.MOHORIC Matej: positive: Solo victory on Signal d'Uchon debut after previous crashes suggests Bahrain's strong climber depth on selective finishes
rider_signals.STUYVEN Jasper: positive: Second place from 29-rider break demonstrates Trek's ability to infiltrate large moves with versatile classics riders
